title: Algorithm Analysis & Design Exam Preparation Flow
description: A flowchart outlining the key steps and decision points for preparing for and successfully completing a semester-end examination in Analysis & Design of Algorithms.
relationships: Sequential flow from Start to Final Grade with feedback loops (e.g., Practice leads to Identify Weak Areas, which leads back to Review) and decision diamonds (e.g., after Mock Exam, if performance is poor, return to Review)
